articles.title: Starbucks Corporation $SBUX Shares Bought by Absher Wealth Management LLC
articles.summary: Absher Wealth Management LLC increased its holdings in Starbucks Corporation by 14.9% during the fourth quarter, now owning 360,227 shares valued at $30,335,000. Several other institutional investors also adjusted their stakes in the company. The article also provides a financial overview of Starbucks, including recent earnings, dividends, analyst ratings, and insider transactions.
